results.title: Next.js
results.description: Next.js is a React framework for building full-stack web applications. It provides additional features and optimizations, automatically configuring lower-level tools to help developers focus on building products quickly.

results.title: Next.js
results.description: Next.js is a React framework for building full-stack web applications, offering features like server-side rendering, static site generation, and API routes.

results.title: Next.js
results.description: Next.js enables you to create full-stack web applications by extending the latest React features and integrating powerful Rust-based JavaScript tooling for the fastest builds.

results.title: Next.js
results.description: Next.js is a React framework for building full-stack web applications, featuring file-system routing, API routes, and optimized rendering with the App Router.

results.title: Nextjs
results.description: A project built using the Next.js framework for web development.

results.title: Next Intl
results.description: next-intl provides comprehensive internationalization (i18n) features for Next.js, including ICU message syntax, date/time/number formatting, type safety, hooks-based API, and internationalized routing.

results.title: Next.js Boilerplate
results.description: A boilerplate and starter for Next.js 15+ with App Router, Tailwind CSS, and TypeScript, prioritizing developer experience with tools like ESLint, Prettier, Vitest, and Clerk authentication.

results.title: OpenNext.js Docs
results.description: OpenNextJS is an open-source framework that brings Next.js-like functionality to other JavaScript runtimes and deployment platforms.

results.title: Next.js Commerce
results.description: A high-performance, server-rendered Next.js App Router ecommerce application template utilizing React Server Components, Server Actions, and other modern Next.js features.

results.title: Next.js Starter for WordPress Headless CMS
results.description: A Next.js starter template for building high-performance applications that fetch and render data from a WordPress headless CMS via its REST API, featuring type-safe data, server-side pagination, dynamic routes, and robust caching.

results.title: Next.js HCaptcha
results.description: A Next.js library that provides a higher-order function to guard Next.js API routes by integrating server-side hCaptcha verification.

results.title: Next Nexus
results.description: Next-nexus is an intelligent data layer for Next.js that simplifies applications with automatic caching, seamless hydration, and built-in cost-saving logic.

results.title: OpenNext
results.description: OpenNext is an initiative to enable self-hosting of Next.js applications across various platforms like AWS, Cloudflare, and Netlify, supporting all Next.js features.

results.title: Next.js i18n Template
results.description: A Next.js template for static site generation with multi-language support using next-intl and dark mode capabilities via next-themes.

results.title: Next.js
results.description: This is an open-source documentation project for Next.js v14, compiled in Markdown format, aimed at AI training with LLMs and serving as a comprehensive reference for developers.

results.title: Next.js
results.description: This repository provides starter templates and final code for Learn Next.js courses, covering App Router, data fetching, databases, auth, basics, TypeScript, and SEO.

results.title: Next.js Starter
results.description: A Next.js 15 starter template with React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn/ui, Stripe, Next-auth, Drizzle ORM, and Jest for a robust and modern web application.

results.title: Next Video
results.description: Next Video is a React component for Next.js applications that provides automatic video optimization, smart storage, customizable UI, and built-in analytics for enhanced video playback.

results.title: Next.js 15 Next-Intl Boilerplate
results.description: A professional Next.js 15 starter template with advanced internationalization (i18n) using next-intl, SEO optimization, dynamic Open Graph images, theme system with dark mode, PWA capabilities, and support for 13 pre-configured locales.

results.title: NextAuth.js
results.description: NextAuth.js is a complete open-source authentication solution for Next.js applications, offering full-stack authentication and data ownership.

results.title: Next.js Starter Template
results.description: A production-ready Next.js starter template with modern tooling, featuring Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, shadcn/ui, NextAuth.js, Drizzle ORM, Stripe integration, and comprehensive testing.

results.title: NextStep
results.description: Lightweight onboarding library for Next.js

results.title: Next ReCaptcha v3
results.description: A straightforward, tiny, and customizable solution for integrating Google's ReCaptcha V3 into your Next.js applications using TypeScript and next/script.

results.title: Next-Sitemap
results.description: Sitemap generator for next.js. Generate sitemap(s) and robots.txt for all static/pre-rendered/dynamic/server-side pages.

results.title: Next.js Auth0
results.description: The Auth0 Next.js SDK is a library for implementing user authentication in Next.js applications, providing seamless integration with Auth0 for secure user management.

results.title: Next Superjson
results.description: A Next.js plugin that enables SuperJSON support in Next.js components, ensuring compatibility with SWC compilation and addressing issues with `next-superjson-plugin`.

results.title: Next SEO
results.description: Next SEO is a plugin that simplifies managing SEO in Next.js projects, offering features for meta tags, Open Graph, and JSON-LD.

results.title: Next Share
results.description: Next Share is a social share buttons plugin designed for Next.js, Create React App, Gatsby.js, and other React applications.

results.title: Next.js Performance Showcase
results.description: This project demonstrates various performance optimization techniques in Next.js, including advanced code splitting with dynamic imports and lazy loading, and diverse streaming patterns for enhanced user experience.

results.title: NextJS Template
results.description: A Next.js v15 project template with preconfigured Typescript, ESLint, Material-UI v7, Tailwind CSS v4, and Docker for containerization.
